name: Ahrefs
description: SEO data: Site Explorer, Keywords Explorer, Rank Tracker, Site Audit via MCP
longDescription: Official Ahrefs MCP server for accessing SEO data. Requires Lite plan or higher. Provides Site Explorer (backlinks, organic traffic), Keywords Explorer (volume, difficulty), Rank Tracker, Site Audit, and Content Explorer. Authenticate via OAuth or generate an MCP-specific API key in Account Settings > API Keys.
author: Ahrefs

apiKeyConfig.label: Ahrefs MCP Key
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Generate an MCP key in Account Settings > API Keys (tagged with 'MCP' scope)

examplePrompts: Find keyword volume for 'SEO tools' in US
Track rankings for my target keywords
Run a site audit for technical issues
